title: Dear Red Hat...
description: Jeff Geerling discusses Red Hat's decision to restrict RHEL source code access, the fallout affecting Rocky and Alma Linux, Oracle's response, SUSE's fork announcement, and the philosophical shift at Red Hat from open company to profit-focused enterprise.
